\tzpentry{ID5702}{Gyromagnetic Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5702 introduces Gyromagnetic Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ \textbackslash{}Omega\_\{FD\}=\textbackslash{}frac\{GJ\}\{c\textasciicircum{}2r\textasciicircum{}3\}\textbackslash{}quad\textbackslash{}text\{(analogwith\}J=I\textbackslash{}omega\_\{gyro \}\textbackslash{}text\{)\} \$
\]
